name: Bio2RDF

formData.dct:title: Bio2RDF
formData.dct:description: Bio2RDF is a large-scale bioinformatics knowledge base and Linked Open Data (LOD) project that transforms heterogeneous life science databases into interconnected Resource Description Framework (RDF) resources.
void:triple: tens of millions of RDF triples

void:sparqlEndpoint.dct:title: Bio2RDF Query Service
void:sparqlEndpoint.dct:description: The Bio2RDF SPARQL endpoint enables federated queries across all biomedical subgraphs, supporting cross-domain discovery and reasoning.

formData.dct:accessRights: The dataset is open access and freely available for academic research, reuse, and integration under open data principles.
